note: Chương dịch N (epub mới, bắt đầu 387) = chapters_zh\{N+5:D4}.txt. Epub cũ dừng ở Chương 386 = zh 0391.
review_notes: 387-389: đã đồng bộ thuật ngữ ngày 2026-07-08.
390-399 (Haiku 4.5): 2 agent x 5. Vá chữ Trung sót, chuẩn hóa Evita/Akali. +10 tên GLOSSARY.

400-449 (2026-07-09, Haiku 4.5, 10 agent x 5): QA nặng. 11 chương phải dịch lại bằng SONNET vì Haiku lỗi: (a) sót/bỏ dở tiếng Trung 413,431; cụt 432; thiếu đoạn 424,438,439; (b) 5 chương 421,422,423,428,447 bị hỏng encoding (mọi dấu cách bị .Replace() PowerShell biến thành 1 chữ cái) -> đã dịch lại sạch. Vá chữ Hán lẻ ở 406,409,416,428 bằng char-code. Đồng bộ ~15 biến thể tên giữa các agent (Kolma Lundes, Truki, Eisenka, Camillo, Lifao, Kantona, Sheldon, Alexis, Xi Hack, Cerwell, Lisi, Kanbi, Plana, Remit). Bổ sung ~70 tên vào GLOSSARY, gộp dòng trùng Kanbi/Kambi. FINAL GATE: 50/50 file 0 chữ Hán, không mangle, đúng tiêu đề.
BÀI HỌC: KHÔNG dùng PowerShell .Replace() để thay ký tự CJK lẻ trên chuỗi có dấu cách -> gây hỏng dấu cách hàng loạt. Nếu chương lỗi thì DỊCH LẠI bằng Sonnet, đừng vá bằng script.
CHẤT LƯỢNG: Haiku 4.5 dịch 50 chương thì ~11 chương (22%) lỗi phải làm lại -> tỉ lệ hỏng cao. Cân nhắc đổi hẳn sang Sonnet cho các đợt sau (đắt hơn ~3x nhưng gần như không phải QA/dịch lại).

CANH BAO QA (2026-07-14): agent (ke ca Sonnet) lau lau bi LAP DOAN VAN (dich trung 1 doan 2 lan). Ratio bytes/so doan co the van 'dep' vi doan lap bu cho doan thieu cho khac -> KHONG chi tin ratio tong. Can quet them: so cau dau cac doan lien tiep trong cung file de bat trung lap, xem chi tiet memo/TRANSLATE_PROMPT.md.
output_epub: Ma Phap Cong Nghiep De Quoc_v2.epub
batch_1142_1146_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 5 chuong 1142-1146 (zh 1147-1151). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Hua Dich thuyet trinh ve ban chat ma phap theo huong song va hat cho cac Ma dao su hai nuoc, sau do cho ban thu nghiem phao chum sang phan ra hat ma phap lam dut doi day nui Tangula lam chan dong quan doi. Hai nuoc ky hop dong dinh chien, nuoc Frank, Sack va toc Delo diet vong, Lanpari va Delac cat cu phan chia dat dai mo rong dien tich. Tan Phi bat dau cong khai chuyen nhuong cong nghe che tao may moc ma thuat va may cong cong ma luc kiem hon 260 trieu dong vang.
batch_1147_1151_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 5 chuong 1147-1151 (zh 1152-1156). QA gate 5/5 pass: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Cong bo Cong uoc Hoa binh Phap su, cam phap su tham gia chien tranh. Tan Phi vien tro may moc ma luc nong nghiep va mo 500 hoc vien ky nang. Kendra cau vien Tan Phi giup thu phuc tinh phia Nam (Windsor dau hang). Hua Dich to chuc hop bao ca nhan tai Bontar gay ra con sot nguoi ham mo.
batch_1152_1156_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 5 chuong 1152-1156 (zh 1157-1161). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Hua Dich to chuc hop bao ca nhan tai Bontar de ky niem 23 nam thanh lap Tan Phi. Anh dung ma phap chieu anh ao va phan phoi thiet bi ma luc de giai quyet on ao cua nguoi dan vi qua dong. Trong buoi hop bao, anh trinh bay quan diem khoa hoc ma phap, khinh thuong ly thuyet ma phap truyen thong loi thoi va cong bo ke hoach dong tau di vong quanh the gioi chung minh trai dat hinh cau.
batch_1157_1161_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 5 chuong 1157-1161 (zh 1162-1166). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Hua Dich tuyen bo tai Bontar se mo cua ky thuat tau ma luc, keu goi huong toi muc tieu bien sao troi (ket thuc quyen 7). Mo dau quyen cuoi, Lucian (hoc sinh tot nghiep Philip o thanh Dolar) khong muon lam viec day chuyen va bi Rondo lua bat coc cung hon 20 phap su tre tuoi trong thung xe tai ma luc.
batch_1137_1141_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1137-1141 (zh 1142-1146). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Lien quan Rulson - Tan Phi danh bai quan doi va ky binh hai De quoc Malo va Kendra bang phi dinh va xe tang ma luc. Hua Dich xuat hien hop thuyet phuc 7 Ma dao su cua hai nuoc ve quan diem khoa hoc ma phap, phu nhan vai tro quyet dinh chien tranh cua phap su truyen thong.
batch_1127_1131_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1127-1131 (zh 1132-1136). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Thong tin ve viec giet chet 3 Ma dao su khien nguoi cua Tan Phi dan quen voi viec danh bai ho. Rulson va Tan Phi phoi hop lay lai thanh Melo va Babral (thu phu hanh tinh Tay Nam cua Kendra). Can truoc phao va vu khi cua Tan Phi, 5 Ma dao su cung 20 van quan Kendra phai rut lui, Babral that thu. Kendra gui Hau tuoc Descartes di hoa dam nhung Hua Dich kien quyet tu choi vi dieu khoan trung lap/trinh thuong. Sau do, lien quan tiep tuc danh chiem hanh tinh Taraman, khien 1 Ma dao su tu tran. Elman Windsor tuyen bo doc lap hanh tinh phia Nam, hanh tinh Tular tuyen bo gia nhap Stan khien Kendra mat di toan bo duong bo bien phia nam va 70% quy mo cong nghiep ma phap. Rulson - Tan Phi tien vao hanh tinh Trung Tam khien Kendra hoang mang, buoc phai xin hoa dam lan 2.
batch_1117_1121_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1117-1121 (zh 1122-1126). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Hua Dich xuat hien hoa giai hien tuong sup do lien hoan khong gian ma luc truoc mat Ofalian, Raduka va 13 Dai phap su. Hai Ma dao su tam phuc khau phuc nhan thua va cam ket khong can thiep vao tranh chap giua Tan Phi va Kendra. Song song, hai de quoc Malo va Kendra cung 13 nuoc bao gom Vuong quoc Ma phap Mana phan cong tren dien rong. Tan Phi va Rulson rut lui nhieu khu vuc, cac mo quang o Rulson bi khinh ky binh Kendra pha huy, Delo va Wales bi xam luoc, Nozdrom bi vay ham. Hua Dich quyet dinh tuyen chien toan dien. Chuyen canh sang trung uy Nokemo o Greenvitae cam nhan duoc su tuong phan giua su cai tri vi dan, no am cua Lanpari va su ap buc cua Malo/Frank.
batch_1122_1126_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1122-1126 (zh 1127-1131). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Lien quan Malo-Frank tan cong thung lung Thien Minh o day nui Grysius nhung bi quan doi Lanpari phan cong. Xe tang ma luc va phi đinh ma lực Tan Phi xuat tran oanh tac. Ma dao su Nargan tu tran, 3 Ma dao su khac trong thuong tháo chay. Lien quan Malo-Frank dai bai mat 6 van quan, Tuong Nokemo/Tướng Phil dau hang, thành Saint Luce và thung lũng Sloder bi chiem. Lanpari chinh thuc xam luoc ban tho Malo, pha vo tuyen phong thu khien 2 Ma dao su khac tu tran. Tai tổng bộ Tan Phi, Hua Dich tiec nuoi vi Ma dao su tu nan va dang lo ngai ve thâm hut tai chinh do vien tro khong hoan lai.
batch_1112_1116_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1112-1116 (zh 1117-1121). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Doi ho ve Tan Phi giang bay du hai Ma dao su Ofalian, Raduka va 13 Dai phap su vao long giam ma phap o thanh Melo, oanh tac khien ho kiet suc. Ofalian dinh lieu chet pha bay thi Hua Dich xuat hien hoa giai. Hua Dich ca cuoc voi hai Ma dao su rang the gioi da thay doi, thoi cua phap su truyen thong tren chien truong da het.
batch_1107_1111_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1107-1111 (zh 1112-1116). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Doi ho ve Tan Phi tan cong thanh Mero, ban sap tuong thanh, Ba tuoc Dempsey dau hang. Vien quan 5 van nguoi cua Kendra bi 50 phi dinh Tan Phi chan dung tren troi. Tieu doi phap su bay cua Kendra bi linh vuc cam ma lam nhieu loan va roi tu do, roi bi xe tang ma luc can quet. Ma dao su Ofalian nghi ngo Hua Dich dua dac tinh linh vuc cua minh vao vu khi ma luc.
batch_1102_1106_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1102-1106 (zh 1107-1111). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Tieu doi phi dinh Tan Phi oanh tac kho hau can o Cevinsi. Ma dao su Raduka truy kich nhung bi phi dinh gia toc tron thoat. Rulson va Tan Phi diet 10 van quan Kendra o thao nguyen Indra, chi ton that 3 nghin. Lanpari sap nhap hoan toan Sack, chia dat Frank. Hua Dich va Caroline xay he thong phong ngu ma luc thanh Dol, thanh toan bang mo khoang san Frank cu. Hua Dich phan tich can dung uu the cong nghe de ket thuc chien tranh nhanh nhat.
batch_1097_1101_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1097-1101 (zh 1102-1106). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Quan Saint Joan rut lui do hoa luc phao cua Tan Phi qua manh. Tren thao nguyen Indra, hai quan doan tan phai cua Kendra duoc trang bi xe ma luc va phao bi Tan Phi oanh tac tu xa 1km. Xe tang ma luc cua Tan Phi xuat tran huy diet doi hinh. Thong soai Marcalos bat ngo nhan tin kho hau can Cevinsi o sau lung da bi phi dinh Tan Phi bay toi xoa so.
batch_1092_1096_note: 2026-07-21: Da dich 5 chuong 1092-1096 (zh 1097-1101). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Kendra va Malo tuyen chien voi Tan Phi. Ban lanh dao Tan Phi quyet dinh dua thuong hoi vao trang thai thoi chien. Quan tien phong Kendra xam nhap Rulson bi tieu diet. O phia bac, quan Tran Bac Lanpari dung min diet 3 van quan Sack. Kendra phai 18 van quan xam nhap Rulson, Tan Phi tuyen bo chinh thuc tham chien bao ve doi tac. Quan Saint Joan do Romon Reger dan dau bi Rulson no min chan duong va phao kich.
batch_1087_1091_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 5 chuong 1087-1091 (zh 1092-1096). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Hua Dich dung thiet bi ma phap tron khoi Wimbledon. De cuu nhan vien phan bo Tan Phi dang bi phong toa, anh cai trang quay lai nhung bi rot khoi khong trung do ket gioi cam ma co 500 nam cua Wimbledon. Hua Dich bi hai Ma dao su Ofalian, Raduka vay ham. De tranh tan pha Wimbledon, hai Ma dao su vat va chan do cac don sam set cua Hua Dich. Cuoi cung, Hua Dich dung thiet bi ma phap lay du lieu ket gioi de de dang bay xuyen qua binh chuong ma phap cam ma thoat di.
batch_1082_1086_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 5 chuong 1082-1086 (zh 1087-1091). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Zidal, Jonah va Roman lap ke hoach bat giu ve binh Tan Phi. Hua Dich den gap Nguyen soai Sudiman o Wimbledon nhung tu choi chuyen giao vu khi ma luc nen bi bat giu. Hoa Long Ma dao su Raduka cung Ofalian hop luc vay sat Hua Dich. Hua Dich the hien dang cap Ma dao su o tuoi 40 va de dang hoa giai linh vuc cung nhu cam chu cua hai doi thu bang thiet bi kim loai dac biet nho vao ly thuyet luc xu huong on dinh.
batch_1077_1081_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 5 chuong 1077-1081 (zh 1082-1086). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Zeberto dan dau doan xe Tan Phi den mo Namtso o Delo bi bao loan dan toi chet nguoi, Zeberto tu nan, Delo lat mat. Ve binh Tan Phi cua Resas don o mo, doi dau 2000 quan Kendra cua Uther. Uther tra 6 xac nhan chung bi tra tan chet. Floyd dot nhap bi mot Ma dao su ao den bat. Mo Namtso bi ban pha luc nua dem, ve binh Tan Phi phai rut chay va phan tan trong rung.
batch_1072_1076_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 5 chuong 1072-1076 (zh 1077-1081). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Cao tang phan bo Ma Van Dai Luc hop ban cach ung pho Goblin. Akali va Cassandra thao luan ve tiem nang cua con nguoi va kha nang danh bai Goblin. Leon (Rong den) muon xin vu khi ma phap va phi dinh de thuyet phuc toc rong hop tac. Bo phan hau can gap ap luc khi Hua Dich chi tieu them 3000 van dong vang/nam cho Ma Van. Ky chiêu mo ho ve thu ba cua Tan Phi ap dung trac nghiem tri tue loai 50% ung vien khien nguoi tuyen duoc giam sau. Hua Dich quyet dinh dieu nghien cuu vien sang de ho tro ho ve su dung may moc. Hua Dich do du truoc bai toan binh nguon va viec lap can cu quan su tai cac nuoc.
batch_1067_1071_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 5 chuong 1067-1071 (zh 1072-1076). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Thuong hoi Freshwater Valley (Malo) lien minh 36 thuong hoi lap Hoi Thong nhat Thung Lung doi khang Chino. De ung pho viec tang gia quang cua Chino, Tan Phi tang manh san luong luyen thep tu dong va thu mua 12 mo o Nozdrom, Wales... Dong thoi, cac thuong hoi Lanpari chiu ton that lon vi mua thep loi cua Chino buoc phai quay lai cau vien Tan Phi. Hua Dich giup ho mang cac san pham loi tang cho cac toc o Ma Van Dai Luc, va nguoi lun Lisotop hao phong cho tra gop mua thep. Tai Ma Van Dai Luc, Akali nghien cuu phao tin hieu lo lung cung rong do Cassandra, gap lai rong den Leon vua tham thinh ve loai nguoi o day. Doi van tai cua Gruel di tang thiet bi cho Gnome Carom bi hang van Goblin bao vay. Akali cung Reinhard dieu 13 phi dinh ma luc den giai cuu, oanh tac Goblin khien chung dai bai chay tron. Tieu diet Goblin pho dien suc manh khung khiep cua vu khi ma phap loai nguoi khien rong den Leon kinh ngac. Ten moi: Freshwater Valley, Hoi Thong nhat Thung Lung, Cong quoc Wales, Feynman An Khoa, Thuong hoi Sakichi, Levincal, Lisotop, Barnett, Reinhard, Vuong tu Tosk, Quoc vuong Namek, Gruel.
batch_1062_1066_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 5 chuong 1062-1066 (zh 1067-1071). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0, ratio 1.46-1.57, so doan khop tuyet doi, 0 dup. Cot truyen: Truong lao Alucia va Lisanya don ham doi tu Ma Van Dai Luc ve cang Tan Phi, gap lai cac Elf va Gnome (lao Traland dan dau). Ho xac nhan Ma Van Dai Luc co loai nguoi nhung rat it, dia vi thong tri thuoc ve toc Goblin sinh san nhanh va hung han khong the giao thiep. Hua Dich to chuc hop bao cong bo ve dai luc moi va moi cac nuoc hop tac khai pha. Co 11 quoc gia dong y tham gia, phai ham doi thieu so hoc cung doan quan su 3000 ho ve Tan Phi va luong lon vu khi quan dung dung tien don tu cung tu cap o Ma Van. Dong thoi, 46 thuong hoi khoang san dung dau la Chimera lien ket lap Lien hoi Chino de nang gia quang sat len 15% va tinh the ma luc len 10% de chen ep cac thuong hoi may moc ma thuat nho. Hua Dich phan cong bang cach lap Thuong hoi Khai khoang Tan Phi, cong bo 17 mo dang khai thac va ban quang sat re hon 20% so voi Chino de truc dien doi dau. Ten moi: Solier (co Solier), Sasha (Sasha), Sansas (toc Elf), Carom (toc Gnome), Glerus (CEO Tan Phi), Lien hoi Chino, Thuong hoi Khai khoang Tan Phi.
batch_1047_1061_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 15 chuong 1047-1061 (zh 1052-1066). QA gate 15/15 pass sach: CJK=0, ratio 1.29-1.47, so doan khop tuyet doi, 0 dup. Cot truyen: Akali phat trien tram tiep song tin hieu ma luc cao khong, dat chan len Dai Luc Ma Van, gap Rong Den Leon (ban thuo au tho cua Cassandra); Russell-Hoang de Kendra ban ve dai luc moi, mua tau ma luc; Thuong hoi Tan Phi cong bo dai luc moi xac nhan, the gioi chan dong; Kruger va Thương hoi Tau Tan Phi tach ra; Dai luc hoan loan - Nozdorm, Wales, Malo, Kendra deu mo rong lanh tho; Tan Phi thiet lap can cu bien phong bao ve Rulson; Hoang de Kendra chap nhan thua tren chien truong, chuyen sang con duong khac; Sanchelli dat dot pha xu ly dong bo da luong phap (tien than may tinh ma phap); Freya 14 tuoi muon ke thua lam Hoi truong, bat dau thuc tap cong nhan; Kennard chinh thuc tu chuc sau 14 nam, Yanis duoc chon lam Tong giam doc dieu hanh doi 2; Thuong hoi Chimera de nghi hop tac xay mang luoi may moc ma phap gia dung (gia tri chien luoc lon). Ten moi: Kanyaso (da co), Yanis (da co trong GLOSSARY), Leon (Rong Den ban Cassandra - can them vao Glossary).
batch_1044_1045_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 1044-1045. Pass QA gate. Cot truyen: Cassandra tham gia dua xe va bi xep chot. Hua Dich de xuat mo xuong sua chua tai dao Hoa Nham va tang Cassandra cung toc nhan nhieu do dac (xe hoi, may chieu anh ao) de tham do thi truong toc rong. Cervini quyet dinh tham gia ke hoach khai pha luc dia Ma Van.
batch_1042_1043_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 1042-1043. Pass QA gate. Cot truyen: Hua Dich xem phim voi Cassandra, hua tang may chieu de co mang ve nha xem. Cassandra tiet lo co la vi ranh qua va muon xem tiep phim nen moi nhan nhiem vu bay ve dua tin. Cervini cai trang di xem giai dua xe chot Tan Phi voi Hua Dich, hoi Cassandra dang ngoi o xe dua nao.
batch_1039_1041_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 1039-1041. Pass QA gate. Cot truyen: Rong Cassandra xem het phim truyen hinh cua Tan Phi va quyet dinh o lai xem tiep; Noval bao cao hạm đội dang o dao cach Saiens 10.000km va phat hien ra Ma Van Dai Luc; Camillo tiet lo truyen thuyet ve Ma toc Vuc Tham cai tri truoc Elf.
batch_1034_1038_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 1034-1038 bang agent. QA gate pass. Them cac thuat ngu cua toc Delo vao Glossary.
batch_1018_1023_partial_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich 1018, 1019, 1020, 1022, 1023 bang 5 agent song song. Pass QA gate. Them cac thuat ngu cua De quoc Kendra vao Glossary.
batch_1016_1030_partial_note: 2026-07-20: Da dich va QA cac chuong 1016-1017, 1021, 1026-1030. Cac chuong 1018-1020, 1022-1025, 1031-1033 dang duoc agent khac dich tiep song song.
batch_1004_1015_note: 2026-07-19: 3 agent Sonnet song song (1004-1007, 1008-1011, 1012-1015). QA gate 5/5 pass sach x12: CJK=0, ratio bytes 1.39-1.54, so dong non-empty out/zh khop tuyet doi, 0 dong trung lap lien tiep, 0 byte dieu khien loi. +25 ten/thuat ngu GLOSSARY moi (Winnie Spencer, Lienor Joshua, Mushel, Cong quoc Asu, thiet bi khien ma phap phong ho ca nhan, thiet bi khuech dai khien ma phap, Dien Cuc Nhan, vat pham cam ma thuat, ma Morse, Ba tuoc Sailan, Cong quoc Assyria, Dai cong tuoc Assyria, Ba tuoc Birmingham, Cindy, Cech, Dien dan Cong nghiep Ma phap Dai luc Saiens, phao ma luc ca nhan/75mm, thiet bi khien ma phap so cap, Ke hoach Doi tac Chien luoc, Noval, Thoi Dai Dai Hang Hai, Magellan, Dien dan/Hoi nghi Dinh chuan Nganh Cong nghiep Ma phap, Uy ban Quan ly Nganh Cong nghiep Ma phap, danh gia cap bac ky nang May moc Ma thuat). Sua 1 loi glossary cu: thi tran Arafat thuoc 'Vuong quoc Falke' (khong phai 'Cong quoc Falke' nhu dong cu ghi nham). Cot truyen: xe cho Winnie/Joshua/Hawart bi cuop chan duong toi Falantis, phap su cap 8 an danh Mushel bat coc nham vao than phan nghien cuu vien cua Winnie, doi ho ve Tan Phi giai cuu (1004-1007); cat canh sang Hua Dich tai Bontar 5 nam sau (thang 10/3898) - ky 5 Dien dan Cong nghiep Ma phap khai mac, Tan Phi cong bo huy quan he Cong quoc Assyria vi vu bat coc, dien dan thanh cong vang doi (~4000 hop dong, ~40 ty dong vang), mo vu khi quan dung cap thap cho 3 nuoc dat chuan cong nghiep cap 3, Ma dao su Salandur Clay xin gia nhap Vien nghien cuu de hoc vu khi tung ha Levin Hasoco (1008-1011); sang nhanh khac: 3 toc Elf cu nguoi tham gia ham doi tham hiem vien duong do Noval chi huy mo 'Thoi Dai Dai Hang Hai'; Hoi nghi Dinh chuan Tieu chuan Nganh Cong nghiep Ma phap - Tan Phi lap Uy ban Quan ly Nganh, De Pha su Ferguson buoc hop tac hoc hoi, tiet lo mot cuon so tay bi mat co ve gia tri lon - chua ro noi dung, can theo doi tiep (1012-1015).
batch_999_1003_note: 2026-07-19: dich truc tiep trong phien chinh bang Sonnet (khong qua Agent/Workflow). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0, ratio bytes 1.305-1.368, so dong non-empty out/zh khop tuyet doi, 0 dong trung lap lien tiep, 0 byte dieu khien loi. +7 ten GLOSSARY moi (Sudak, Tyler, thanh Falantis, thanh Morro, Bo Xuc tien Co so Ha tang, thuoc la cuon co Ham Nhu, hop thoai ma phap). Phat hien 1 loi go cua tac gia goc o ch.1003 (zh 1008): '我和泰勒赶着要出发' (toi va Tyler) trong khi Tyler o lai lap thap tin hieu - da dich thanh 'toi voi Winnie' cho mach truyen nhat quan (xem ghi chu ROLLING_SUMMARY). Cot truyen: goc nhin dan thuong tiep tuc tai thi tran Arafat (Vuong quoc Falke) - Joshua (nhan vien Bo Xuc tien Co so Ha tang Tan Phi, chong Winnie) ve tham nha anh re Compani, thuyet phuc cho con trai Hawart vao hoc vien dao tao ung dung ma phap Tan Phi; yet kien Tu tuoc Risos trinh ke hoach xuc tien co so ha tang da duoc Nghi vien Falke phe chuan, chon Arafat lam diem thi diem dau tien, trong tam giao duc dao tao; thuyet phuc Compani nhan lam vien truong hoc vien so cap sap xay; ke lai uy danh Hoi truong Hua Dich tung giet Ma dao su Levin Hasoco 5 nam truoc. Hai ngay sau, Winnie+Hawart theo Joshua toi vuong do Falantis bao cao Nghi vien; Tyler nho Joshua tien duong dua phap su Sudak (cap 3) ve can cu chinh Tan Phi; giua duong Sudak say xe phai dung lai trong rung, dung luc ay ~20 nguoi co vu trang xong ra vay xe - chuong ket o tinh huong nguy hiem moi (cuop duong), chua ro dien bien, can theo doi tiep o batch sau.

Cot truyen: Russell (Kendra) mua tau ho ve Tan Phi, doi lai Kendra hua giup Tan Phi 'thuan loi tien vao De quoc' (noi dung cu the CHUA ho lo); ra mat Quat/Dieu hoa Ma luc the he moi tiet kiem nang luong; Lisanya quay quang cao; Stella mang thai LAN HAI (thang thu 3); lat cat xa hoi bien gioi Delac-Falke, khach bi an tu Falke do hoi cong nghe Tan Phi (nghi gian diep).
batch_745_764_note: 2026-07-14: 4 agent Sonnet x 5 chuong (745-749, 750-754, 755-759, 760-764), chay song song. QA gate 20/20 pass: CJK=0, ratio bytes 1.37-1.55, space% 15.9-16.5, so dong out/zh khop tuyet doi tung chuong (0 lech), 1 false positive doan trung lap (2 cau lien tiep cung mo dau, noi dung khac nhau - khong phai loi that). Phat hien + sua 1 xung dot ten giua 2 agent: Crusk vs Krusk (克鲁斯克王国) -> thong nhat ve 'Crusk' (dung nhieu hon, sua 2 cho trong 0760.md). Phat hien Camillo da THANG CAP tu 'Dai phap su' len 'Ma dao su' (魔导师, tu khoang ch.664 tro di trong nguyen van zh) - cap nhat GLOSSARY, cac chuong cu <664 giu nguyen 'Dai phap su' (khong sua nguoc). +19 ten GLOSSARY moi (thanh Rioer, Thuong hoi Sanchi, Kreisler Isore, Martin, Nam tuoc Sotu, Ba tuoc Hussein, Bilier Stark, Vuong quoc Crusk + cac thuc the lien quan, Remington, Kelabi Morey, Sandy, thanh Nodanlon, noi com/may lam banh mi ma luc, Tuan San Xe Ma Luc). Cot truyen: Leslie-Russell hop tac ngam o lanh hai Kendra; Tan Phi cong khai cong nghe luyen thep doi lay ~2 van no le (bi mat chua lo); Vuong quoc Crusk (hai tac) tan cong ham doi van tai Tan Phi va bi Tan Phi XOA SO hoan toan trong <1 thang; Vuong quoc Sack chan dong, nang Tan Phi len uu tien tinh bao cao nhat; Nu vuong Cervini ha sinh Vuong tu; Truong lao Lisanya sap thanh guong mat dai dien quang cao moi cua Tan Phi.
batch_1162_1166_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 5 chuong 1162-1166 (zh 1167-1171). QA gate 5/5 pass sach: CJK=0, ratio 1.42-1.47, 0 doan trung lap. Cot truyen: Lucian va nhom hoc sinh bi bat coc toi mot trang vien co phap tran linh vuc cam ma va xe chien ma luc. Mot co gai ky la dung ma phap He Khong Gian tu do va sung phong ten lua ma luc tieu diet xe chien ma luc de giai cuu ho. Lucian phat hien co gai co tinh de bi bat de nho Harris den dong lo buon nguoi. Lucian sua duoc hop thong thoai duoi anh huong cam ma nho du lieu co gai cung cap. Co gai danh tang Lucian mot tin vat/suat de cu vao Vien nghien cuu Ma phap Tan Phi, nhung Lucian tu choi vi tu ton.
batch_1167_1172_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 6 chuong 1167-1172 (zh 1172-1177). Cot truyen: Nhom Lucian duoc tha ve Doral. Tieu Cong tuoc Windsor dat hang thiet bi giam sat ma luc tu Tan Nguyet. Lucian den Cang Tan Phi tuyen dung va gap lai co gai tinh linh he khong gian.
batch_1173_1178_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 6 chuong 1173-1178 (zh 1178-1183). Cot truyen: Freya gap lai Linoia va tro ve gap cha me. Linoia cau hon Hua Dich nhung bi tu choi. Huyen thoai ve cac toc Elf va ke hoach thap tin hieu ma luc.
batch_1179_1184_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 6 chuong 1179-1184 (zh 1184-1189). Cot truyen: Nu vuong Cervini tranh mat Hua Dich, Raymond dai dien lien lac. Vuong quoc Kulanyi bao loan do Lefalu khoi xuong, Hua Dich nhanh chong dan ap va thiet lap he thong cong nghiep ma phap chi phoi toan quoc. Kendra (Debor XVII va Galbut) lo ngai ve su thon tinh cua Tan Phi.
batch_1185_1189_note: 2026-07-22: Da dich 5 chuong 1185-1189 (zh 1190-1194). QA gate 5/5 pass: CJK=0. Cot truyen: Galbut gap Freya tai le ky niem Nha may luyen thep, Freya chia se thong tin nhay cam ve thung lung Troll va Theresa khien ho hoang mang. Hua Dich chi dao du an lam duong xuyen nui Kulanyi, nhan thay cong nghe ma phap dang phat trien dot pha nho tich luy van nam. Djorkaeff do hoi mua cong nghe xe ma luc cong trinh cho Amli, Hua Dich dong y gap Cruz.
